title: Best Supplements for Fat Loss
short_description: A simple stack for energy, thermogenesis, and appetite support.
who_for: People trying to lose fat while keeping the plan simple and stimulant-aware.
avoid_if: Stimulant sensitivity, uncontrolled blood pressure, pregnancy, heart rhythm issues, or stimulant medications.

title: Best Supplements for Sleep
short_description: A nighttime stack for winding down, sleep timing, and a cleaner bedtime routine.
who_for: People who want simple nighttime support for winding down and sleep timing.
avoid_if: Pregnancy, sedative medications, untreated sleep apnea, shift-work complexity, or next-day grogginess from sleep aids.

title: Best Supplements for Stress
short_description: A calm-focused stack for daily stress load without a complicated routine.
who_for: People who want calmer days without building a complicated supplement routine.
avoid_if: Pregnancy, thyroid conditions, autoimmune conditions, sedative medications, bipolar history, or sensitivity to calming supplements.

title: Best Supplements for Cognition
short_description: A focus stack for attention, mental effort, and long-term cognitive routines.
who_for: People who want focused, low-clutter support for attention, mental effort, and long-term cognitive routines.
avoid_if: Cholinergic medications, stimulant sensitivity, pregnancy, bipolar history, or anxiety worsened by caffeine.

title: Best Supplements for Performance
short_description: A strength-focused stack for training output, volume, and repeat performance.
who_for: Lifters and active adults who want practical strength, volume, and workout support.
avoid_if: Kidney disease, pregnancy, major medical conditions, or poor tolerance to pre-workout vasodilators.
